title: Citrusy Polish Flour Grill
description: A kid-friendly Polish dish made with plain flour, featuring a citrusy twist and grilled to perfection. This dish is low in sodium and can be served as a snack or light lunch.

ingredients.name: Zest of 1 lemon
ingredients.notes: Use a vegetable peeler to remove the skin of the lemon, then grate it on a fine grater.

ingredients.name: Zest of 1 orange
ingredients.notes: Use a vegetable peeler to remove the skin of the orange, then grate it on a fine grater.

instructions: Preheat a non-stick pan or griddle over medium heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, egg, milk, lemon zest, orange zest, and salt-free seasoning until a smooth batter forms.
Add the butter to the batter and mix until combined.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the batter onto the preheated pan and cook for 2-3 minutes, until the edges start to set.
Flip the pancakes and cook for another 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
Serve the Citrusy Polish Flour Grill hot with your favorite toppings, such as fresh fruit or whipped cream.
